unit.name: wpdb row materialization live database Haxe candidate
unit.public_contract: WordPress-compatible maybe_create_table(), maybe_add_column(), dbDelta(), and wpdb::query/get_var/get_row/get_results remain callable with their public PHP class/function shape while selected schema, dbDelta, result-population, raw mysqli metadata, query/fetch call gates, fetched-row traversal decisions, row field/value materialization, and mysqli_query()/mysqli_fetch_object() execution delegate to typed Haxe. The WPHX_305_17_MysqliBoundary generated PHP class is removed from this candidate; generated Haxe PHP emits direct global \mysqli_query($handle, $query), \mysqli_fetch_object($result), \get_object_vars($row), \array_values(...), \array_shift(...), and \is_object($row) calls through @:phpGlobal externs.

bridge.reason: WordPress core and plugins call global PHP upgrade helpers and wpdb methods with native PHP signatures, mutable public state, and stdClass/array result contracts. The candidate keeps those public PHP shells, delegates normalized table/column existence, dbDelta planning, selected-row result population, raw mysqli metadata guards, query/fetch call gates, fetched-row traversal policy, row field/value materialization, and mysqli query/fetch execution to typed Haxe, with WpdbMysqliExecution and WpdbRowMaterialization lowering to idiomatic PHP globals through @:phpGlobal externs.
bounded_by: WPHX-305.21 live MySQL/MariaDB oracle comparison receipt

removal_gate.condition: Promote from generated shell candidate to verified owned distribution only after broader wpdb/schema distribution work proves include timing, reflection, mixed PHP ABI, plugin compatibility, and wpdb replacement/drop-in behavior.

smell_fixes.description: Separated maybe_create_table()/maybe_add_column() branch decisions, bounded dbDelta classification, wpdb result-shape/null decisions, wpdb::query return/state branch decisions, _do_query timing/logging/execution/reconnect policy, selected-row last_result/num_rows population policy, fetched-row presence and assignment-slot policy, row field/value materialization, mysqli metadata read/fallback guards, mysqli query/fetch call gates, and mysqli query/fetch execution from handwritten/generated PHP boundaries into typed Haxe helpers. WPHX-305.21 keeps the two-method WPHX_305_17_MysqliBoundary class out of the live candidate and moves get_object_vars()/array_values()/array_shift()/is_object() row operations into generated Haxe PHP direct global calls.

notes: The candidate provisions mysql-8.4 and mariadb-11.8 containers from locked index digests and runs the WPHX-305.07 live DB cases plus WPHX-305.11 result-shape, WPHX-305.12 query-state, WPHX-305.13 native-execution, WPHX-305.14 result-population, WPHX-305.15 raw-resource metadata, WPHX-305.16 boundary-entry, WPHX-305.17 fetched-row traversal, WPHX-305.19 mysqli @:phpGlobal lowering, WPHX-305.20 live @:phpGlobal integration, and WPHX-305.21 row materialization cases with local PHP mysqli. The broad wp-admin include remains stubbed because this workset is scoped to database helpers, dbDelta planning decisions, wpdb mysqli native execution, row result materialization, and storage paths.
